name: tree-of-thought
desc: A branching reasoning tree (ToT / GSM-8K shape): a root prompt that branches 2 ways at each of 2 levels; every node appends a thought segment; the requests are the 4 root-to-leaf paths. Siblings share every ancestor, so reuse is MULTI-LEVEL - the case a single declared prefix cannot capture.
sglang_published: multi-level branch reuse; within the 50-99% band
